note: Phase 15H acquisition backlog. PLANNING ONLY. These are CANDIDATE targets to research and acquire later — they are NOT validation cases, carry NO observed outcomes, and must NEVER be loaded by the validation ledger. This file is intentionally absent from manifest.json. 'expected_outcome_tier' / 'expected_action_signals' describe what evidence we ANTICIPATE being able to find at acquisition time; they are not measurements. Every target carries do_not_ingest_yet=true. Real cases are only added later, externally reviewed, via scripts/phase_15g_add_validation_case.py. Candidate names beginning 'TBD —' are archetypes; the human reviewer selects the specific product at acquisition time. Adds no accuracy and applies no calibration.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — popular open-source CLI/dev tool with public GitHub history
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the GitHub source gap (0 cases today) and adds Tier-1 revealed-action (fork) evidence.
targets.notes: Stars/forks are public over time; the prediction must be reconstructed clean-room and leakage marked honestly. Likely training-only or non-clean-holdout.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — Reddit-launched indie/consumer app (r/SideProject or similar)
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the Reddit source gap (0 today); Reddit sentiment vs. real signups is a useful bias probe.
targets.notes: Outcome often founder-provided (signups/traffic); confirm denominator honestly.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — Chrome Web Store / App Store extension or app with public install count
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the app-store source gap (0 today) and adds Tier-1 install/download evidence with a clear denominator.
targets.notes: Install counts are public; reconstruct prediction clean-room. Reviews give a Tier-3 cross-check.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — B2B SaaS public launch (prospective lock)
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the B2B source + b2b_saas category gaps (0 today); paid signups are the strongest Tier-1 ground truth.
targets.notes: PROSPECTIVE: lock prediction before outcome. Requires Phase 14C durable artifacts and is a paid run — do not start until both are approved.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — AI productivity tool launched on Product Hunt
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the ai_productivity category gap (0 today); PH upvotes (Tier 2) vs. real conversion tests the hype-vs-action gap.
targets.notes: Upvotes public; conversion/waitlist may need founder data. Mark which buckets are upvote- vs. action-derived.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — AI agent / autonomous-tool launch (prospective lock)
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the ai_agents_tools category gap (0 today); a high-hype category where calibrated skepticism matters most.
targets.notes: PROSPECTIVE: clean holdout candidate. Requires Phase 14C + an approved paid run before locking.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — note / PKM tool with public waitlist or upvote signal
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Fills the note/PKM category gap (0 today); a crowded category good for testing skeptical/resistant calibration.
targets.notes: Confirm waitlist denominator. Tier-2 evidence acceptable if marked honestly.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — Kickstarter hardware campaign with public backer + pledge totals
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Strengthens crowdfunding_hardware (1 today) with additional Tier-1 backer/pledge ground truth and a clean denominator.
targets.notes: Finished campaigns expose backers + pledge total publicly; reconstruct prediction clean-room.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — Show HN developer tool (prospective lock)
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Prospective clean-holdout candidate from an existing strong source (HN); pairs HN sentiment with real GitHub adoption.
targets.notes: PROSPECTIVE: lock at Show-HN time, observe GitHub adoption weeks later. Requires Phase 14C for a durable lock.

targets.candidate_name: TBD — consumer mobile app with public download + review data
targets.reason_for_inclusion: Adds a second app-store / consumer data point with Tier-1 downloads and (if available) retention.
targets.notes: Retention rarely public — may be downloads-only (Tier 1) plus Tier-3 reviews. High leakage risk if outcome widely known; likely excluded from clean holdout.
